CREATE TABLE polygons (id INT, shape GEOMETRY);
SELECT ST_InteriorRingN(shape, 1) FROM polygons WHERE id = 3;
SELECT ST_InteriorRingN(shape, 2) FROM polygons WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ST_InteriorRingN(shape, 1) FROM polygons WHERE id IN (1, 2) ORDER BY id;
SELECT ST_InteriorRingN(shape, bif:ST_NumInteriorRings(shape)) FROM polygons WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, ST_InteriorRingN(shape, 1) AS first_ring FROM polygons WHERE shape IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, bif:ST_NumInteriorRings(shape) FROM polygons WHERE bif:ST_NumInteriorRings(shape) > 0;
SELECT id, ST_InteriorRingN(shape, 3) FROM polygons WHERE id = 4;
SELECT ST_InteriorRingN(shape, 1) FROM polygons AS p JOIN polygons AS q ON p.id = q.id;
SELECT ST_InteriorRingN(p.shape, 1) FROM polygons AS p, polygons AS q WHERE p.id != q.id;
SELECT ST_InteriorRingN(shape, CASE WHEN bif:ST_NumInteriorRings(shape) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM polygons;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, ST_InteriorRingN(shape, 1) AS ring1 FROM polygons) AS subquery ORDER BY ring1;
